description_long: This is a compact, freestanding wooden cabinet finished in a light gray color. The front features a single pull-out drawer with a small round knob, situated above an open shelf area divided by a horizontal panel. The base and top have decorative molding, and the lower apron is scalloped, adding a touch of classic style. The sides and back are plain, with no additional features or openings. The overall design is sturdy and functional, suitable for use as a nightstand, side table, or small storage unit in urban environments such as apartments, offices, or lobbies.
description: A light gray wooden cabinet with a single drawer and open shelf, featuring decorative molding and a scalloped base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer with knob, open shelf, and decorative scalloped base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat panel with visible molding at the top and base.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat back panel with molding at the top and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with plain panel and molding details.
